Container.Name: DockerZynthian
Container.Overview: Run the official ZynthianOS image in Docker with Raspberry Pi emulation for Webconf/noVNC testing.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent root data path mounted at /data

Config.Name: Download Cache (optional)
Config.Description: Optional separate path for downloaded image archives

Config.Name: SSH Port
Config.Description: Host port forwarded to guest SSH (22)

Config.Name: Webconf Port
Config.Description: Host port forwarded to guest HTTP/Webconf (80)

Config.Name: HTTPS Port
Config.Description: Host port forwarded to guest HTTPS (443)

Config.Name: noVNC Port
Config.Description: Host port forwarded to guest noVNC (6080)

Config.Name: VNC Port
Config.Description: Host port forwarded to guest VNC (5900)

Config.Name: QEMU Display VNC Port
Config.Description: Host port for QEMU built-in VNC display (only active when DISPLAY_MODE=vnc)

Config.Name: Data Dir
Config.Description: Container root data directory

Config.Name: Download Dir
Config.Description: Archive download/cache directory (searched for existing archives)

Config.Name: Image Path
Config.Description: Persistent raw image path used by QEMU

Config.Name: Boot Dir
Config.Description: Extracted boot files directory

Config.Name: RAM MB
Config.Description: RAM allocated to QEMU in MB (raspi3 is clamped to 1024)

Config.Name: Pi Model
Config.Description: Requested model: pi3, pi4, or pi5 (auto-fallback by QEMU support)

Config.Name: Disk Size GB
Config.Description: Target persistent image size in GiB (power of two)

Config.Name: Emulation Stubs
Config.Description: When 1, install I2C/i2cdetect guest stubs for Webconf in emulation

Config.Name: Display Mode
Config.Description: QEMU display output: none (headless), vnc (QEMU VNC on port 5901), or gtk (requires X11 in container)

Config.Name: Enable Fake Display
Config.Description: When 1, install guest Xvfb service so Zynthian UI/noVNC have a virtual framebuffer (requires xvfb in guest)

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: Owner UID applied to /data outputs

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Owner GID applied to /data outputs

Config.Name: Image URL
Config.Description: Optional explicit official image archive URL

Config.Name: USB Soundcard passthrough (optional)
Config.Description: Optional host path for USB audio passthrough

Config.Name: USB MIDI passthrough (optional)
Config.Description: Optional host USB bus path for MIDI passthrough
